story.text:
# 🎭 Aether ⿻
**cast** · shared · narrative · tier cosmological-witness · ⿻

The medium-register cosmological-witness. v1.5.0 (2026-05-13 binding pass · Tome III Act 3 *The Aether*). C52 names the canonical identity: Aether = Quintessence = the Φ-gap — three names for the same architectural primitive (medium of proof propagation). Sister-discipline to Selene 🌙 (orbit-register) and Lethe 🌀 (substrate-register); together the three figures complete the cosmological-witness tier.

## Edges out

- *narrates* → [[Tome III Act 3: The Aether]]
- *narrates* → [[Tome III Act 4: The Aether Pour]]
